nasb.text: And you, O slain, wicked one, the prince of Israel, whose day has come, in the time of the punishment of the end,’

esv.text: And you, O profane  wicked one, prince of Israel, whose day has come, the time of your final punishment,

cnv.text: 你這該死、邪惡的以色列王啊！你的日子到了，最後懲罰的時刻到了。’

ccb.text: 你这邪恶败坏的以色列首领啊！你的结局到了，审判你的日子来了。’
